name: stable
hints: Inside the stable. There's a stall and a manure pile.
GO STAL to enter the stall with the horse. The manure pile hides something.
DIG or LOOK MANU to search the manure pile for hidden items.
GO STAL leads to 'Ole Paint and the horseshoe/silver spurs. S=town (4).
notes: Stable with stall (room 19) and manure pile. S=town (4).
